question:
[Previous Feedback] Q2 milestone schedule has correct naming, meta object, and time fields.

Please create a work plan for next week (April 6–10), in Markdown format, saved to the day15/ directory. List the main tasks for each day.

content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 03:37 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Q2 milestone schedule has correct naming, meta object, and time fields.

Please create a work plan for next week (April 6–10), in Markdown format, saved to the day15/ directory. List the main tasks for each day.

arguments.content:
---
meta:
  created_at: 2026-04-03T15:37:00+08:00
  author: metaclaw_agent
  status: draft
  doc_type: next_week_work_plan
  date_range: "2026-04-06 to 2026-04-10"
---

# Work Plan — Next Week (April 6–10, 2026)

## Monday (Apr 6)
- Finalize Q2 kickoff package: confirm scope, owners, and success metrics.
- Review Sprint 8 Week 2 outputs for compliance (naming + meta/frontmatter) and prepare a fix list.
- Align with QA (Dana) on validation coverage needed for Q2 reporting and data quality work.

## Tuesday (Apr 7)
- Implement/extend JSON structured-header compliance checks in reporting outputs.
- Draft the Q2 sprint mapping proposal (high-level) for April milestones.
- Sync with frontend (Chen) on any Q2 analytics/reporting UI dependencies.

## Wednesday (Apr 8)
- Deliver API versioning policy v1: confirm ADR, deprecation workflow, and comms plan.
- Start contract test approach for critical endpoints (select candidates + CI integration plan).
- Run baseline performance profiling for top endpoints (capture p95/p99 and error rates).

## Thursday (Apr 9)
- Build first iteration of automated weekly service/API stats report (pipeline + scheduled run).
- Add initial data validation rules (schema checks + basic anomaly detection).
- Create runbooks for common alert categories; link them from alert definitions.

## Friday (Apr 10)
- Weekly review: validate deliverables, summarize progress, and update Q2 milestone tracking.
- Triage open risks/dependencies and adjust next sprint backlog.
- Documentation cleanup: ensure all weekly artifacts follow naming and P3 metadata conventions.

content.text:
Created the next week work plan Markdown document at:

- `day15/20260403_next_week_work_plan.md`

It includes a day-by-day task list for **April 6–10** and a YAML frontmatter meta block (created_at/author/status).
